scenes.summary: Kier crosses the flood-barrier and learns the tribunal has sealed the ancestral district.
Low-tier bailiffs and censer monks attack as Kier uncovers forged disease ledgers.
A hidden archive reveals that the accusation predates the plague by generations.
Kier defeats the Plague Bell pack-master beneath the ferry crypts.
A Goduly offers a memory shard showing human merchants importing the true contagion.
NPC factions react to Kier's reputation as rumors spread through the open-world settlements.
The Penitent Poet unlocks a side route into the Salt Forest via a metered verse challenge.
A mid-tier siege keeper turns the canopy paths into a projectile gauntlet.
Travel records prove the plague entered by war-barge from the western principalities.
A mounted inquisitor attempts to burn the evidence and brand Kier a heretic.
Goduly avatars preserve testimonies in suspended resin, expanding the procedural lore graph.
Pseudo-3D parallax chambers rotate while Kier navigates orbital lifts and hidden judgment shafts.
Clockwork scribes and top-tier duelist bailiffs guard the chamber of inherited blame.
A secret mural shows the tribunal needed a foreign culprit to unify the warring fiefdoms.
Kier duels the Sable Notary, who weaponizes edited memories as phase attacks.
The first Goduly demands that Kier reenact the first trial in a memory theater.
Optional duels against mirrored ronin examine how the player treats neutral factions.
Traversing astral reed bridges unlocks parallax reality layers over the main world.
A Goduly interaction sequence becomes a combat test if Kier's reputation falls too low.
The last living plague survivor reveals a state-sponsored coverup.
Twelve deity avatars overlap their arenas in a multi-phase boss council.
Kier chooses which truths to release, altering final world-state generation.
Settlements reflect accumulated player reputation, alliances, and witness testimony.
The high judge enters a souls-like duel phase with summons from every prior arc.
The final boss remaps the arena using plague routes and cosmic star-lines.
Kier delivers a final verdict: absolution, condemnation, or shared culpability.
The world regenerates under the chosen truth, seeding New Game Plus myth variants.
